name: Claunch
content: I have not actually visited Claunch, but it is the closest named location to where I saw a bunch of horses. The horses were very friendly. I would give GPS coordinates, but I only took photos on film and did not think to write down the location at the time. The closest I can guess is 34°06'59.0"N 105°59'39.9"W. I hope you are able to find horses as well.
